description: A character column becomes a factor implicitly, so as.numeric returns level codes instead of the real values.
body: Failure mode: a character column is coerced to factor on import or construction, and a later as.numeric returns the integer level codes rather than the intended values, silently corrupting the analysis. Detection signals: numbers that look like small sequential integers after conversion; joins failing on columns that print identically; unexpected factor class in str(). Do not convert a factor straight to numeric. Safer fallback: import with character columns, convert via as.numeric(as.character(x)), and set factor levels explicitly only where needed.
